name: Dropdown
description: Select field with bordered trigger, chevron, listbox of ListItem rows, and optional label, hint, error, leading icon/avatar. Supports keyboard navigation.

props.name: error
props.description: Error message — puts the field in error state.

props.name: leadingIcon
props.description: Leading icon for the trigger (shown when no value selected).

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class for the root element. Layout composition only — do NOT use for custom styling.

props.name: id
props.description: ID for the trigger button. Auto-generated if not provided.

states.rationale: Dropdown trigger hover changes border color only — no background OKLCH shift or overlay on the main surface. ListItem rows use their own hover treatment. Keyboard highlight on list items uses the state hover overlay.

keyboard.ArrowDown: Open listbox or move highlight down

accessibility.focusManagement: natural tab order; arrow keys within listbox

propertyMapping.note: Visual-only Figma property. In code, states come from CSS pseudo-classes (:hover, :focus-visible, :disabled) and data attributes (data-error, data-open).
Figma 'type' (text | avatar | icon) controls leading content. In code, leading content is determined by option.icon, option.avatarSrc/avatarInitials, or the leadingIcon prop.
Figma 'text' shows selected item label. In code, resolved from options array by matching value prop.
Direct mapping. Default 'Select' in both Figma and code.
Figma boolean. In code, error is a string — truthy = error state + message.
Figma errorText content maps to the React error string prop value.
Figma boolean toggles clear button. Dropdown in code does not support clearable — only DropdownAutocomplete has clear.
Figma boolean toggles chevron. In code, chevron is always rendered.
Figma 'change' is an icon swap slot. In code, mapped to the leadingIcon prop or option.icon.

useWhen: Choosing from a predefined list of options
Select fields with icon or avatar leading content
Form fields requiring single-value selection with label and validation
doNotUseFor: Multi-select — use a dedicated multi-select component
Action menus — use ContextMenu or Dropdown-specific action variants

knownDeviations.description: Figma uses a single 'dropdown+autocomplete' component set for both Dropdown and DropdownAutocomplete. In code, they are separate components. This manifest covers only Dropdown (non-searchable select).
Figma component does not include label or hint rows. In code, Dropdown renders label, trigger, and hint/error as a single component. Label and hint are code-only props.
Figma 'clear' boolean exists on the shared component set. In code, Dropdown does not support clearable — clearing is only available in DropdownAutocomplete.
